programmes.show_description: Durham. Adam Richman returns to Durham, North Carolina, for burgers and barbeque, and to recruit a team for the Doughman Challenge: a four-member, food-and-sport relay race. S2, Ep3
Charlotte, North Carolina. Casey Webb is in Charlotte, North Carolina, to try three southern specialities. He tries a cheesy chicken dish, a signature sandwich and a huge taco. S4, Ep2
Smokin' Southern Decadence. Guy Fieri samples smoking Southern meats at a family-run barbecue joint in Alabama. Then, he visits Chef G. Garvin's next-level steakhouse in Atlanta. S39, Ep1
Hearty Handfuls. Guy Fieri digs into hearty handfuls of major flavour, like next-level pizza in Tennessee, tasty tacos in Alberta, and elevated empanadas in Georgia. S38, Ep12
Wrapped, Pied And Fried. Guy Fieri has it wrapped, pied and fried with craveable carnitas in Mobile, Alabama, elevated pizza in Cody, Wyoming, and brisket in Omaha, Nebraska. S38, Ep8
Flavor Explosion. Guy Fieri dives into a flavour overload with next-level tacos in Mobile, Alabama, Indian street food in Alberta, Canada, and vegan twists in Los Angeles. S38, Ep9
Crazy Chocolate Cake & Carlo's Centennial. The crew mark their 100th anniversary with a memory lane cake and party. Plus, Buddy makes a special announcement about the future. S3, Ep21
Frescos, Fountains, Family. The Valastros continue their Italian trip with a culture lesson in Rome. They're asked to make a cake inspired by a fresco painting for an art collector. S3, Ep23

programmes.show_name: Tom Kerridge Secrets Of The Pub Kitchen
programmes.show_description: Good Eggs. Tom showcases the magic properties of eggs. Custard tart is on the menu, and Tom shares how to make foolproof white chocolate and lemon soufflés. S2, Ep9

programmes.show_name: Tom Kerridge Secrets Of The Pub Kitchen
programmes.show_description: Italian Job. Tom's menu includes wild boar lasagne, sausage and fennel rigatoni and tiramisu pots. Chef Sarah takes control when a rush of orders hits the kitchen. S2, Ep10
Country. The duo head to Nashville, Tennessee, to learn about the roots of country music. Plus, they cook biscuits and gravy and visit the Grand Ole Opry stage. S1, Ep6
Last-Minute Holidays. Ree reveals her favourite shortcuts as she shares last-minute food ideas for the holidays. She uses refrigerated bread dough for a yummy Christmas tree pizza! S24, Ep4
New Year Brunch. Ree Drummond hosts her friends for a New Year brunch featuring revamped favourites. She makes a baked bagel egg-in-a-hole and serves cute waffle pops. S24, Ep5

programmes.show_name: Jamie's Easy Meals For Every Day
programmes.show_description: Avocado Tempura/Flavoured Popcorn. Jamie whips up a mouth-watering chicken dish served with his special baked beans, then Buddy shares different ways to flavour popcorn. S1, Ep23

programmes.show_name: Jamie's Easy Meals For Every Day
programmes.show_description: Chorizo, Pepper & Prawn Bake/Frittata. Jamie cooks up a flavour-packed rice dish with chorizo and prawns. Plus, he shares his recipe for an Indian-inspired frittata. S1, Ep24
Barefoot Contessa Burger Joint. Ina makes burgers with a twist. She gives the sides a makeover with a buttermilk ranch dressing on bibb lettuce and sweet potato chips. S5, Ep7
How The Cookie Crumbles. Ina bakes a double delicious treat - chocolate chunk blondies and cookies using one easy batter. Plus, Patti Page shows Ina how to make animal cookies. S5, Ep8
Tarts. The remaining bakers must use some unusual flavour combinations in their tartes tatin. Featuring artisan baker Paul Hollywood and the doyenne of baking, Mary Berry. S3, Ep3
Desserts. Amateur bakers make an array of decadently rich tortes and a crème caramel, under the watchful eyes of judges Mary Berry and Paul Hollywood. But who will triumph? S3, Ep4
James and chef Martin Blunos explore the food on offer in the picturesque town of Vannes. They use local ingredients to make a special monkfish meal. S1, Ep4
James Martin demonstrates the classic technique for preparing and cooking scallops. Plus, he is joined by chef Martin Blunos to cook cod in beer batter. S1, Ep5
James Martin and chef Martin Blunos explore the charming port of Pornic. They cook local scallops with shrimp butter and make a special strawberry tart. S1, Ep6
James Martin continues his food adventure in the beautiful port city of Saint-Malo. He is joined by chef Lawrence Keogh to cook some delicious veal. S1, Ep7

Warsaw. Paul Hollywood is in Warsaw discovering its café scene. Head chef Jarek Nowakowski and Paul create an updated Polish babka - sponge flavoured with citrus, honey and coconut. S1, Ep8
Miami. Paul Hollywood is in Florida's bustling seaside city - Miami. He creates his own version of the Floridian classic Key lime pie with a deceptively easy recipe. S1, Ep9
Bari. Adam's in Bari tasting the most iconic foods named after this city, including focaccia Barese and a local seafood dish called tiella Barese. S1, Ep9
Rome. Adam's in Rome tasting the most iconic foods named after this city, including pasta dish cacio e pepe, and porchetta Romana: suckling pig Rome style. S1, Ep10
Charleston. Adam Richman heads to Charleston, South Carolina for oysters served by the shovel, a fried chicken sandwich smothered in sausage gravy, and a spicy tuna sushi challenge. S2, Ep4
Wilmington, North Carolina. Casey's culinary adventures take him to North Carolina. He tries a BBQ bonanza, a burrito and takes part in the undefeated Pierogi team challenge. S4, Ep1
'Round The World Roundup. Guy Fieri digs into a world of flavours all over the United States! In Georgia, Guy samples Korean chicken wings before heading to Utah for Lebanese food. S29, Ep11
Eating Up New Orleans. Guy Fieri is taking a tasty tour of New Orleans, Louisiana. He stops at a seafood restaurant that serves up creative dishes and tries potato salad with a twist. S29, Ep13
Sauced And Spiced. Guy is looking for big flavour. In Tennessee he visits a place serving lamb with Syrian spiced tomato sauce. In Minnesota a café serves wild rice French toast. S10, Ep6

programmes.show_name: Diners, Drive-Ins And Dives: Triple D Nation
programmes.show_description: Guy Fieri hits up a joint in Knoxville, Tennessee, where the food comes straight to your car. Then, he samples spiced crab cakes in Somers Point, New Jersey. S4, Ep2
Cassata, Cheesecakes & Crates Of Wine. The Valastros spend the last leg of their Italian holiday in Sicily. At a local winery, Buddy makes a 'wine bottle cake' for the owner. S3, Ep24
Santa, Sunrise, & Snowmen Cupcakes. It's Christmas Eve - the busiest day of the year at Carlo's and all hands are on deck to make sure the customers get their scrummy cakes in time. S3, Ep2
